{{Quote|Take my advice, kid, Wookiees know how to make a homebrew that'll put a human on the floor in minutes.|Han Solo advises Jarik|<ref name="Rebel Dawn">''[[Rebel Dawn]]''</ref>}}
'''Accarrgm''', also spelt as '''accarragm''', was an extremely potent pale [[Color/Legends|colored]]<ref name="SWG" /> [[Liqueur/Legends|liqueur]]<ref name="Rebel Dawn" /> made using [[Fungus/Legends|fungus]]<ref name="SWG" /> by the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. Like many Wookiee liqueurs, it was strong enough to inebriate a [[Human/Legends|Human]] in [[Standard minute/Legends|minutes]]. By the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]] the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] was aware of the potency of accarrgm and other Wookiee liqueurs, and so stuck to other drinks whilst at the [[Wedding of Chewbacca and Mallatobuck|wedding]] of his co-[[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], warning his companion [[Jarik Solo]] to do the same.<ref name="Rebel Dawn" /> By [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] accarrgm was made by [[Chef/Legends|chefs]] across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] as it could be consumed by many species including [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]], [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorians]], [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]], [[Rodian/Legends|Rodians]], [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustans]], [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshans]], [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'leks]] and [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabraks]].<ref name="SWG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Accarragm first appeared in the [[1998]] novel ''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' by [[A. C. Crispin]]. It then featured as a drink in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|MMORPG]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' made by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment. Initially the drink could only be crafted by players of the chef profession but after the "New-Game Enhancements" made in [[2005]] chefs were merged into the [[Merchant/Legends|trader]] profession, with only domestic traders able to make the drink. It could be consumed by all playable species in the game. The drink had an entry in the [[2008]] ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', which misspelled its name as accarrgm.
